FUNDING_EXTREME_LONG.description: Funding rate very negative — crowded shorts, potential long squeeze

FUNDING_EXTREME_SHORT.description: Funding rate very positive — crowded longs, potential short squeeze

OI_SURGE.description: Open interest up >20% in 24h — new money entering

MOMENTUM_OI_CONFIRM.description: Price up >3% AND OI up >10% — trend with conviction

DUMP_OI_CONFIRM.description: Price down >3% AND OI up >10% — bearish with conviction

OI_BUILDUP_BULLISH.description: OI up >15% + Price up >1% — long buildup

OI_BUILDUP_BEARISH.description: OI up >15% + Price down >1% — short buildup

NEAR_52W_HIGH.description: Price within 2% of 52-week high — breakout watch

NEAR_52W_LOW.description: Price within 2% of 52-week low — breakdown watch

PCR_EXTREME_BULLISH.description: Put-Call Ratio >1.5 on index — oversold, potential reversal up

PCR_EXTREME_BEARISH.description: Put-Call Ratio <0.5 on index — overbought, potential reversal down
